title: hieracium dolosum subsp. vasconicum
intro: Hieracium dolosum subsp. vasconicum, also known as the Vasconian Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium dolosum subsp. vasconicum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
